name: console
description: Local-first desktop command center for any repo: overview, workboard, repo orientation, a live architecture graph, pipeline, services, release gates, and observability, in a Guided or Operator view, with multi-window multi-project support.

scripts.build: npm --prefix console-shell run build && npm --prefix console-electron run build:main
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix console-shell run typecheck && npm --prefix console-electron run build:main -- --noEmit
